mainEntity.name: Timing to refresh directory profiles for 2026 LA AI changes?
mainEntity.text: Timing to refresh directory profiles for 2026 LA AI changes?

acceptedAnswer.text: Refresh LA profiles every 3-6 months or post-AI updates to maintain fresh signals for ongoing referrals.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Quarterly for LA dynamics. Post-OpenAI releases (Q1/Q3). Adds cases/reviews. Neglect fades visibility. Automate reminders. High-traffic firms monthly. Balances effort/ROI.[3]

name: Profile Refresh Schedule for LA AI
description: Refresh LA profiles every 3-6 months or post-AI updates to maintain fresh signals for ongoing referrals.[3]
